profile.description: Prefer in-game recognizability, stable density, and fail-safe local defaults.

basic_pitch.failure_mode: portable-safe fallback through melodic fallback chain

piano_transkun.failure_mode: clear RuntimeError, then melodic fallback when used through import

piano_pti.failure_mode: clear RuntimeError unless checkpoint or explicit download opt-in is configured

piano_hft.failure_mode: clear RuntimeError unless checkpoint and command adapter are configured

torchcrepe.failure_mode: clear RuntimeError, then melodic fallback when used through import

beatnet.failure_mode: availability-only until wired as a beat/downbeat prior

omnizart.failure_mode: availability-only research comparator; never required for portable import
